feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Need help with blackmailer
entry.content: I was sharing nudes with a Reddit user as one does on the subreddit. “She” asked me for my WhatsApp so we can have more fun. I didn’t want to use my personal so I used my work number. I know, how stupid of me. Now I am being treated to be exposed to my contacts and family. I don’t know how far they are willing to take it but I don’t know what else to do but to ask for help to you anons. I will leave the number and Reddit handle to do what the community does best when someone is in a bind. I have

entry.title: /b/ Random: Suicide
entry.content: are there any other ways besides helium that will end my life painless and fast, and has anyone found ways to get the medications they give terminally ill patients. i'm looking for real constructive feedback and ideas so please actually try and help. > inb4 calling me a pussy to use a nuse or gun, I'm trying to do this without leaving as much of a mess as possible, but I don't have the means to just fuck off into a forest or someobdy will know wha'ts up.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: What do you guys think of plasma TVs? Anyone still using this technology? My bro…
entry.content: What do you guys think of plasma TVs? Anyone still using this technology? My brother gave me a 50 inch full HD LG after he upgraded and movies look really good. The way it displays motion is super smooth and colors and black levels are surprisingly good for a 12 year old TV.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Which apps are we actually losing that are truly worth anything? Okay, NewPipe i…
entry.content: Which apps are we actually losing that are truly worth anything? Okay, NewPipe is a real loss. But all the other apps on F-Droid are just slop. A lot of things can easily be replaced with Progressive Web Apps. So, what exactly are we losing?

entry.title: /int/ International: ¿Alguien sabe cómo renovar la credencial del Instituto Nacional Electoral sin da…
entry.content: ¿Alguien sabe cómo renovar la credencial del Instituto Nacional Electoral sin dar consentimiento para la «CURP biométrica»? ¿O cómo rechazar esto que es básicamente la versión mexicana del proyecto globalista de la Digital ID? Porque requiere proporcionar huellas dactilares de todos los dedos de ambas manos, una fotografía digital del rostro y una firma digital. Tal vez esté confundiendo ambas cosas (tarjeta del INE y CURP biométrica) pero pienso que podrían correlacionarse en secreto.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Is there anything more comfy than searching for the keyword "zombie apocalypse" …

entry.title: /g/ Technology: The Free Universal Decentralized Protocol
entry.content: https://github.com/FUDP-Organizatio n FUDP = Free Universal Decentralized Protocol is a P2P file-sharing protocol based on hash so to get a file it's only "GET and the "call" is relayed between the peer but they only know the last IP so nobody know if it's the original sender or a relayer ! and everyone can create their own client ! but everyone is on the same network ! and... it's can be everything not just file-sharring but a full P2P Web !!!!

entry.title: /g/ Technology: support for Google Earth desktop to be dropped from 2027
entry.content: after 25 years of honored service, this legendary program is the latest victim of unprecedented corporate greed; now we are all supposed to switch to the browser version, which is completely ridiculous is there any chance it (at least the interface) will be ever released open source or someone will make a very similar clone, or someone will decompile the code or whatever? asking for nostalgia purposes my life won't be the same anymore

entry.title: /news/ News: Turkey's Erdogan gifts every NATO leader a revolver after summit, Starmer gets extra bullets
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/lifestyle/t urkeys-erdogan-gives-nato-leaders-r evolver-conundrum-after-summit-2026 -07-09/ MADRID, July 9 (Reuters) - Belgium's prime minister was a little surprised on landing back home from Wednesday's NATO summit in Turkey to find that he had a handgun and ammunition in his luggage. After NATO leaders gathered for Wednesday's fractious summit in Ankara, their host, Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan, handed each an unusual parting gift: a vintage revolver, along w

entry.title: /news/ News: Secret Service advised Trump to not fly Qatari-gifted Air Force One
entry.content: https://thehill.com/homenews/admini stration/5960254-secret-service-adv ised-trump-to-not-fly-qatari-gifted -air-force-one/ The Secret Service advised President Trump not to leave the NATO Summit in Turkey on the newer Qatari-gifted Air Force One, according to a Wednesday report. Sources familiar with the matter said the president flew out of Ankara on the older Air Force One out of an abundance of caution for a potential threat from Iran, although no threats were explicitly identified, The New

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Forgotten Pilots
entry.content: >In 1995, Lou Reed filmed an unaired television pilot called Dirty Boulevard, intended to be a New York centric series that followed him through his favorite diners, delis, coffee shops, bars, and longtime local hot spots across the city. Despite interest in the concept, the pilot was never picked up. https://youtu.be/__MxC5vFQ5I?si=IGC FuWloJFAwrCap

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I've just invented a complicated but real world based way to measure how fast a car is
entry.content: I called it length of overtake. It show how long can you stay on the opposite lane before crashing into a car that drives in opposite direction before crashing, assuming you're accelerating and the other car is moving at constant speed. This shows how many cars can you overtake at once.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Tech Rage Thread
entry.content: >want to replace shitty AMD-branded MediaTek Wifi/BT chip (RZ608) on the motherboard with an Intel one (AX210) >remove motherboard from the case >remove VRM cooling shroud covering the top-left of the motherboard >remove M.2 adapter seated in the PCIe connector >carefully remove the antenna cables from the MediaTek mini board >unscrew the thing, replace with Intel board >now process the preceding list of steps in reverse >turn on computer >install official drivers for both the Wifi and Bluetooth
